tasks.question: I _______________ (to watch) a film when the telephone _______________ (to ring).
She _______________ (to do) her homework when her friend _______________ (to call).
We _______________ (to walk) in the park when it _______________ (to start) to rain.
He _______________ (to read) a book when he _______________ (to hear) a strange noise.
They _______________ (to have) dinner when someone _______________ (to knock) on the door.
When I _______________ (to arrive), my parents _______________ (to drink) tea.
The boy _______________ (to fall) down when he _______________ (to run) for the bus.
I _______________ (to listen) to music when my mother _______________ (to come) into the room.
While we _______________ (to play) football, the ball _______________ (to hit) the window.
She _______________ (to drive) her car when she _______________ (to see) an old friend on the street.
